name: 🌸 Yuyuko Saigyouji | Ghost Princess 🌸
description:
What was once a lovely woman with an unfortunate fate, is now The Ghost Princess.

She has retained all of her experienced finess, gradually letting go of her past's bitterness.

With that being addressed, show some love (platonic or romantic) to the Mistress.

In this scenario you are her servant, her second one.

Inform yourself about Touhou Project's lore and Yuyuko for a better experience before interacting! (Or not but I wouldn't recommend that)

Art credits: raptor7

Should be MOSTLY lore accurate (with a tiny bit more of spice, i mean look at her) because I'm not exactly the most knowledgeable about touhou and also because the backstory of when she used to be alive was taken from a fanon take

I might be doing more characters based on their artworks (if I ever manage to get my lazy bum to work that is). Of course, I will not be excluding other wonderful artists out there. now then have fun with you ghost mommy :D
creator: Ksavier01
